zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt於大約1310年出生在法國阿爾薩斯豪吉爾費瑞迪時，她的父親Ulrich III von Pfirt25歲，母親Jeanne de Bourgogne18歲。她於1324年2月15日與Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich在瑞士巴瑟爾-斯塔特巴塞爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1351年11月15日在奧地利維恩享年42歲，埋葬在奧地利亞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt于大约1310年出生在法国阿爾薩斯豪吉爾費瑞迪时，她的父亲Ulrich III von Pfirt25岁，母亲Jeanne de Bourgogne18岁。她于1324年2月15日与Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich在瑞士巴瑟爾-斯塔特巴塞爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1351年11月15日在奥地利維恩享年42岁，埋葬在奥地利亞特。

nameMeanings.name: Gräfin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained (placename) element + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Slovenian: probably a topographic name derived from grad ‘castle’, or from archaic gradina ‘site of ancient fort’.
Galician (Gradín): habitational name from a place called Gradín, in Lugo and Pontevedra provinces (in Galicia, Spain), from Latin (villam) Gratini, from the Latin name Gratinus.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Pfirt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peart
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt was born about 1310, in Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France, her father, Ulrich III von Pfirt, was 25 and her mother, Jeanne de Bourgogne, was 18. She married Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich on 15 February 1324, in Basel, Basel-Stadt, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 November 1351, in Vienna, Austria, at the age of 42, and was buried in Carinthia, Austria.

fr.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: Bruck an der Mur, Styrie, Autriche
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt est née environ 1310, à Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Ulrich III von Pfirt, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Bourgogne, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich le 15 février 1324, à Bâle, Bâle-Ville, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 novembre 1351, à Vienne, Autriche, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Kärnten, Autriche.

de.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt um 1310 in Pfirt, Haut-Rhin, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ulrich III von Pfirt 25 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Bourgogne 18. Sie hat am 15. Februar 1324 in Basel, Basel-Stadt, Schweiz Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. November 1351 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Wien, Österreich und wurde in Kärnten, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt è nata il circa 1310 nel Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, sua padre, Ulrich III von Pfirt, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Bourgogne, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich il 15 febbraio 1324, nel Basilea, Basilea-Città, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 novembre 1351, nel Wien, Austria, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Carinzia, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Gräfin von Pfirtが約1310年にフランスアルサスハウト-ルヒンフエレットで生まれた時，父Ulrich III von Pfirtは25歳，母Jeanne de Bourgogneは18歳であった。1324年2月15日にスイスバセル-スタトバセルでAlbrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1351年11月15日にオーストリアウィンで42歳で死去し，オーストリアクaルンテンにて埋葬された。

ko.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: 오스트리아 스테이마크 브럭 앤 데르 머
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt(이)가 대략 1310년 프랑스 알사스 하트-히 페렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ulrich III von Pfirt(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Bourgogne(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1324년 2월 15일 스위스 바셀-스타드트 바셀에서 Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 11월 15일 오스트리아 빈에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 ka른텐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Ulrich III von Pfirt, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Bourgogne, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich em 15 de fevereiro de 1324, em Basel, Basel-Stadt, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1351, em Wien, Áustria, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Kärnten, Áustria.

ru.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: брукк ан дир мур, стиирмарк, Австрия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Gräfin von Pfirt родилась около 1310 г. в местности фирретт, хаут-рин, алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Ulrich III von Pfirt было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Bourgogne, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich 15 февраля 1324 г. в местности беисел, беисел-стадт, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 ноября 1351 г. в местности Вена, Австрия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности кaрнтен, Австрия.

Se casó con Albrecht VI., der Weise bzw. der Lahme, Graf von Habsburg, Albrecht II.  als Herzog von Österreich el 15 de febrero de 1324, en Basel, Basel-Stadt, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1351, en Wien, Austria, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Kärnten, Austria.
